name: Optimizing humanize system prompt for maximum rewrite quality

description: Baseline: current system prompt scores 7.12 overall. Checks script needs fix (iOS build issue). Fixing checks script.

Baseline: system prompt scores 7.38 overall. Weak: personality (6.5), rhythm_variety (6.62), overcorrection on clean text (4). Fixed eval infra (OpenAI for humanize, Anthropic for judge, checks script).
Expanded prompt v2: explicit buzzword list, overcorrection rule, voice/rhythm guidance. Overall 7.38→7.5. Clean text overcorrection 4→9. Corporate/news personality still weak (4-5).

name: Optimizing humanize system prompt (blended eval v2)

description: Prompt v18: 'copy word-for-word' for clean text, pattern-only editing. 8.07 vs 8.06. Clean text overcorrection improved (3.0→4.55). Marginal but directionally correct.
